description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, open layout with large glass windows and sliding doors that connect the interior to the outdoor garden and patio areas. The front facade is characterized by a mix of white and gray exterior walls, with extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes landscaped lawns, trees, and a driveway leading to a covered carport. Outdoor amenities such as a hammock, benches, and a small gazebo are visible, enhancing the recreational appeal. The rear and side elevations show a more private arrangement with fewer windows and solid wall sections. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor transition.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a covered carport, surrounded by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, patio, driveway, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, extended lawn, and outdoor seating areas, with fewer windows on the visible wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying solid wall sections, minimal windows, and a private backyard area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, gazebo, and a mix of window arrangements along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and scattered windows on sides
